name: Data Spine and Radeon Runtime
objective: Establish the minimum credible financial data foundation and prove local model and embedding inference inside the Radeon/ROCm competition boundary.
scope: Forja Alpha financial PostgreSQL data spine for identity, source objects, filings, XBRL facts, metric observations, time series, and point-in-time views
local source snapshot adapters for SEC identity, SEC submissions, SEC Company Facts, Treasury, FRED/ALFRED, and adjusted market series
loopback-only local model and embedding readiness verification
sanitized model candidate and embedding benchmark harnesses
integrated Sprint 10 recovery verifier and one-shot evidence runner
out_of_scope: Sprint 11 deterministic analysis tools and evidence packs
agent planner and product web experience
remaining_runtime_gates: capture a real Radeon Cloud runtime receipt outside Git
serve and benchmark at least two loopback open-weight instruction model candidates on Radeon
serve and benchmark one loopback local embedding endpoint on Radeon
prove source, configuration, and evaluation recovery after instance destruction without committing model weights or secrets
author: codex
